title: Yamato Stands Against Kaido
description: On pages 14–16, this part focuses on Unknown person #13, Kozuki Alliance, Tama, Unknown person #14, Yamato, Straw Hat Pirates as The raid enters decisive Straw Hat and alliance battles while Yamato confronts Kaido and Momonosuke struggles to become Wano’s hope.
scene: The raid enters decisive Straw Hat and alliance battles while Yamato confronts Kaido and Momonosuke struggles to become Wano’s hope.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: without Pedro, Luffy and the others would never have made it here!!

dialogue.speaker: Kozuki Alliance
dialogue.text: The RAID would've failed for sure!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: The full moon is beautiful tonight..

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This is the last moon you-gara will ever see,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Oden is dead, and now you serve a glorified child!

dialogue.speaker: Tama
dialogue.text: How dare you mock the young master?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Even US misfits eventually became Samurali!!

dialogue.speaker: Yamato
dialogue.text: Wano itself will shape momonosuke- Sama's growth!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We won't let you take that hope away!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Do we even stand a chance?!

dialogue.speaker: Straw Hat Pirates
dialogue.text: Straw hat, get back, it's danger- ous!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If you attempt to eat me, I will devour you whole!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: What!? The kid that was just here?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I followed MOMONOSURE- SAMAs ORDERS!! I Aged HIM till he was 28 year old!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: didn't know you could do that. Why are you crying though?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Momo!! Let's go take back wano!!

summary: This part advances the Wano / Onigashima War through 41 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on battle momentum, shifting alliances, and character resolve.
